Index.title: Build your CRM on WhatsApp
Index.description: VCRo Hub turns your Meta WhatsApp Business API into a shared inbox, sales pipeline, and automated broadcast tool.

Onboarding.description: Let's get your workspace set up in 2 quick steps.
Onboarding.step1Desc: Link your official Meta API credentials so your team can start sending and receiving messages.
Onboarding.step2Desc: Bring your sales and support agents into the shared inbox.
